Prerequisite: CPSD200.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science, Discovery & the Universe (CPSD) program.

CPSF - College Park Scholars-Life Sciences

CPSF100 College Park Scholars: Life Sciences First-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit)

Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to the life sciences.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Life Sciences (CPSF) program.
